title: Campaign
description: A campaign (<Campaign>) — the descriptor that binds a sequence of missions into a story, as read from the game's own Campaigns/*.(Campaign).xdb. A campaign does NOT contain its maps; each mission POINTS at a map through that map's map-tag.xdb (see src/map-tag.ts), and the maps travel beside the descriptor in the .h5c. Same x- keywords as the map schema (src/schema.ts): x-ref an href/picker, x-file + x-widget textfile a sibling text file, x-registry a dynamic roster (src/registry.ts), x-widget the control, x-advanced a tree-only deep structure. A user-made campaign sets UserCampaign true, which is what lists it under the game's Custom Campaigns.

InternalName.title: Internal name
InternalName.description: The campaign's script handle — how missions and the campaign set address it. Not shown to the player.

NameFileRef.title: Name
NameFileRef.description: The campaign's short name, in a sibling text file.

NameCommentFileRef.title: Name comment
NameCommentFileRef.description: A short subtitle shown beside the name.

DescriptionFileRef.title: Description
DescriptionFileRef.description: The campaign blurb on the selection screen.

UserCampaign.title: User campaign
UserCampaign.description: Custom campaigns set this true — it is what makes the game list a packed .h5c under Custom Campaigns. The shipped campaigns leave it false.

Missions.title: Missions
Missions.description: The missions in play order. Each points at a map by its map-tag; every referenced map is packed into the same .h5c.

DependentCampaigns.title: Prerequisite campaigns
DependentCampaigns.description: Campaigns that must be finished before this one unlocks (references to other Campaign documents). Empty for a standalone user campaign.

AdventureMusic.title: Adventure music
AdventureMusic.description: The campaign-wide adventure-map theme — pick a shipped Music, or reference a custom one carried in the campaign.

Icon.title: Icon
Icon.description: The campaign's menu icon (a Texture reference). Optional.

MissionTag.title: Map
MissionTag.description: The mission's map, referenced through its map-tag.xdb (map-tag.xdb#xpointer(/AdvMapDescTag)). Picked from the map projects on disk; the chosen map's whole folder is bundled into the .h5c beside the campaign. This is the one link between a campaign and a map.

Bonuses.title: Starting bonuses
Bonuses.description: The bonuses offered at mission start; the player picks one. Up to three, each an artifact, some creatures, resources, a spell or a building.

Bonus.title: Bonus
Bonus.description: One of the mission-start choices. Only the fields the Type uses matter; the rest sit at their neutral defaults.

Type.title: Type
Type.description: Which field below the bonus grants.

Building.title: Building
Building.description: A town-building id (e.g. TB_TOWN_HALL) granted built.

BonusTarget.title: Target
BonusTarget.description: What the bonus is applied to — the starting hero for every shipped campaign bonus.

Hero.title: Hero
Hero.description: Present (empty) to target the starting hero.

HeroesPool.title: Heroes pool
HeroesPool.description: Heroes carried into a later mission — how a campaign keeps your hero between chapters.

HeroScriptName.title: Hero script name
HeroScriptName.description: The hero's script handle on the source mission's map.

TargetMission.title: Target mission
TargetMission.description: The 1-based mission this hero is carried INTO.
